job.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
job.summary: Senior full-stack role on the analytics product. Build features end-to-end across Python API and React frontend, design data models, mentor mid-level engineers.

candidate_chunks.content: 8 years building React applications, including a year as feature lead at Katana MRP
Built a JWT/OTP auth flow from scratch at ObsidianOS, covering token rotation and rate-limited OTP delivery
Designed PostgreSQL schemas and SQL import pipelines for the LottoLens data platform across multiple lottery types
TypeScript, React, Vite, TanStack Query, Tailwind, Node.js
Planned and shipped a 170-ticket ingredient booking feature as feature lead at Katana MRP

top_chunks.content: 8 years building React applications, including a year as feature lead at Katana MRP
